subcodes.first_line: Arise and say: O people of the Bayan! Fear ye the All-Merciful. Will ye oppose Him Whom God hath made the Dawning-Place of His power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قم و قل یا ملا البیان اتقوا الرحمن ا تعترضون علی الذی جعله الله مطلع قدرته و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @station of the Manifestation of God
